    WHO
    WE ARE

    BACH HOP Co., Ltd. Manufacturing Technology  was established on 2008 with a certificate of business registration No. 0305446504 by the Department of Planning and Investment of Ho Chi Minh City. The company's head office is located at: No. 86/1N – 86/1M, MH4 Str, Xuan Thoi Dong Ward, Hoc Mon Dist, Ho Chi Minh City.

    With the strategy going into the field of knitting, our company specializes in producing items as follows:

         1. Traditional knitting products (Cotton100%, CVC, TC, viscose, PE, Poly, Bamboo, Modal, Tencel, melange ...)

         2. Single jersey  for Ladies ( stripes, jacquard lycra, Viscose yarndye etc.)

         3. French Terry ( Brushed and Unbrushed ), Polar Fleece, Interlock…

         4. Single jersey with spandex and 100% cotton

         5. Tricot, mesh with all sport knitting fabrics in 100% polyester

    Join closely with customers throughout the order fulfillment process. Constantly looking for innovative technical solutions to improve product quality and customer service. Our business way is "best quality, delivery on time, competitive price and professional service" lead to the success of customers’.

    VIEW MORE
    ABOUT US

    OUR

    WORK

    Bach Hop Company has years of experience in knitting products our company has been providing large orders for domestic and international markets.

    With the goal of becoming the supplier professional of  textile products on the market of Vietnam, Bach Hop Company to continuously improve operations management and technical innovation. In addition to management activities were held INTERTEK ISO 9001 certified, our company is always researching and manufacturing process improvements, advanced technology to create high-quality product line, meeting the requirements of the fashion market.

    Specialization and  improvement are the competitiveness in the market so that using our products, customers will not worry the quality of materials and just to focus on the output Market. With professional team of engineers and technicians, we suggest customers to choose the right fabric, weight, finishing …. That can match to customer’ garment designs , and manual inspection of products throughout the fabric processing . Bach Hop company has always taken seriously and is willing to provide the best technical support services to customers.
